/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/engine.dir/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/engine.dir/home/sid/Documents/GitHub/self-learning-chess/c_tactics.cpp.o" -o engine   -L/home/sid/Documents/GitHub/self-learning-chess/cpp_engine/onnxruntime/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sid/Documents/GitHub/self-learning-chess/cpp_engine/onnxruntime/lib -lonnxruntime -lpthread
